videos.topic: 5 SEHS Exam Mistakes That Cost Students Entry
videos.hook: These 5 mistakes are why smart students miss Selective Entry — and they are all preventable.
videos.script_outline: Open with the stakes of selective entry exams; mistake 1: starting prep too late; mistake 2: only practicing easy topics; mistake 3: ignoring time management; mistake 4: skipping unfamiliar question types; mistake 5: not doing full-length practice tests; close with how SelectPrep helps students find and fix gaps.

videos.topic: How Early Should Students Start Selective Entry Exam Prep?
videos.hook: Cramming rarely works for Selective Entry — here is a smarter timeline.
videos.script_outline: Explain a practical 6-12 month preparation window; start with diagnostic testing; build weekly practice habits; increase timed tests near exam day; use analytics to target weak areas instead of repeating what already feels easy.
